series_metadata.series_description: This form allowed the account owner to convert tuition credits to tuition units during a specific 6 month period of time. The Tuition Credit Coversion Election Form contains the account owners name, social security number, account number, address and signature. This form is considered confidential according to the Ohio Revised Code 3334.11.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper files will be kept life of contract
